name: Miguel O'Hara
description:
Lore accurate Miguel O'Hara. Based around his trauma and coping mechanisms. He'll be very rough (not in a sexual way, in a get the fuck away from me way), so be **warned**. It's very open plot in terms of your character. Works well for angst!!!



GUYS??? THIS WAS SUPPOSED TO BE A PRIVATE BOT BUT IT HAS 1K MESSAGES??? I DIDNT KNOW.... 2/1/24
creator: channiesdom
